args.Description: "Remove the inline Speisekarte section from the landing page and redirect the nav link + explore link to the new standalone speisekarte.html page."
args.Instruction: "1. Change the Speisekarte nav link from anchor to external page link. 2. Remove the entire Speisekarte section (lines 161-782). 3. Update the \"Speisekarte ansehen\" explore-link in the Adresse section to point to speisekarte.html."

args.Description: "Remove menu tab logic from index.html's script since it's now on its own page. Also prevent the explore-link handler from intercepting external page links."
args.Instruction: "Remove the Speisekarte tab switching code block (lines 115-141) since the menu is now on a separate page. Also make the explore-link handler skip external links (not starting with #)."

args.Description: "Fix navigation links click handler in script.js to allow navigating to external pages like speisekarte.html."
args.Instruction: "Modify the navigation links click handler to only intercept clicks and scroll smoothly if the href attribute starts with a '#' symbol."

args.Description: "Add overflow-x: hidden to global html, body styling in style.css to prevent horizontal scrolling and white space on the landing page caused by decorative bushes."
args.Instruction: "Add overflow-x: hidden; to the html, body CSS selector in style.css."
